extraction_reasoning: The litigation table reports, against the Company, Nil criminal proceedings, 4 tax proceedings, Nil statutory/regulatory proceedings, and Nil material civil litigations; against the Directors, Nil criminal, Nil tax, 1 statutory/regulatory, and Nil material civil proceedings; and against the Promoters, Nil in all listed categories. I counted only the Against rows and excluded all By rows, including the one civil matter filed by the Company; tax remains separate from statutory/regulatory proceedings, and no subsidiary row is separately disclosed. The aggregate quantified amount against the Company is ₹9.12 million, while the Directors’ amount is not quantifiable; therefore the group amount is ₹9.12 million, converted at ₹10 million per crore to ₹0.912 crore. Contingent liabilities use the explicitly stated Total of ₹9.12 million as of June 30, 2023, also converted to ₹0.912 crore. Company-wide customer concentration for the most recent full fiscal year, Fiscal 2023, is 74.62% for the top five and 83.74% for the top ten, calculated as revenue from operations from those customers divided by total revenue from operations; the source tables use ₹ millions.
